name: zhihu
description: Zhihu Q&A search, user profiles, topic feeds, trending — page transport with cookie session via L3 adapter

dependencies.searchContent → getMember: searchContent returns author url_token used by getMember
dependencies.searchContent → listSimilarQuestions: searchContent returns question IDs used by listSimilarQuestions
dependencies.getMember → getUserAnswers: getMember returns url_token used by getUserAnswers
dependencies.getMember → listMemberActivities: getMember returns url_token used by listMemberActivities
dependencies.getMember → listMemberMutuals: getMember returns url_token used by listMemberMutuals
dependencies.getMember → followUser: getMember returns url_token used by followUser
dependencies.searchContent → upvoteAnswer: searchContent returns answer IDs used by upvoteAnswer
dependencies.searchContent → followQuestion: searchContent returns question IDs used by followQuestion
